confirm_close.title: Downloads in progress
confirm_close.message: You have {{count}} active download(s). Closing now will cancel them.

legal.title: Use OmniGet responsibly
legal.body_paragraph_1: OmniGet is a tool to download media you are entitled to access. You are responsible for respecting the copyright and terms of service of every platform you download from.
legal.body_paragraph_2: By continuing you acknowledge the following:
legal.rule_copyright: I will only download content that I own, have a licence for, or that is explicitly free to reuse.
legal.rule_tos: I will respect the terms of service of the source platform.
legal.rule_personal_use: I understand this tool is provided as-is and the maintainers are not responsible for misuse.

recovery.title: Unfinished downloads
recovery.message: OmniGet found {{count}} download(s) that didn't finish last session. Would you like to resume them?

toast.external_url_ready: URL received and ready to download
toast.external_url_queued: Download added from the Chrome extension

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.code_hint: We sent a code to your Telegram app
telegram.no_media: No media found in this chat.
telegram.qr_instruction: Open Telegram on your phone, go to Settings > Devices > Link Desktop Device

general.title: General
general.start_with_system_desc: Launch OmniGet automatically when your computer starts
general.start_minimized_desc: Open OmniGet to the system tray without showing the window. Click the tray icon to open.

download.embed_metadata_desc: Write title and artist info into downloaded files
download.embed_thumbnail_desc: Embed album art into audio files
download.organize_by_platform_desc: Save files in subfolders named after the platform
download.include_auto_subtitles_desc: Also fetch captions auto-generated by YouTube when no manual ones exist (quality varies)
download.translate_metadata: Translate video title and description into your app language
download.translate_metadata_desc: Ask YouTube to localize titles and chapter names to the app language (YouTube only)
download.youtube_sponsorblock_desc: Cut sponsored, intro and outro segments from YouTube videos (community-sourced data; may miss or over-cut)
download.split_by_chapters_desc: When the source has chapter markers, save each chapter as a separate file
download.hotkey_enabled_desc: Download clipboard URL with a keyboard shortcut
download.copy_to_clipboard_on_hotkey: Copy file to clipboard after hotkey download
download.copy_to_clipboard_on_hotkey_desc: Automatically copy the downloaded file to clipboard for easy pasting
download.filename_template_desc: yt-dlp output template for downloaded files

telegram.fix_file_extensions_desc: Add correct extension to files based on type

typography.presets_desc: Tested combinations. One click applies fonts + line-height + spacing.
typography.fonts_desc: Per-family choice. List shows fonts bundled with the app (system fonts not yet supported).
typography.line_height_desc: Vertical space between lines. Higher = airier, easier to read on long sessions.
typography.spacing_desc: Multiplies the space tokens (padding, gap, margin). 1.0× = default. 0.85× compacts the entire UI; 1.25× makes it airier.
typography.preset_omniget_default_desc: Bricolage display, Inter body, Plex Mono. House standard.
typography.preset_notion_like_desc: Inter for display + body. Hierarchy by size+weight, not family swap.
typography.preset_compact_desc: DM Sans + Inter, 90% spacing. More text on screen.
typography.preset_reading_desc: Bricolage + DM Sans, line-height 1.7, 110% spacing. Long sessions.
typography.preset_tech_minimal_desc: Plex Mono everywhere. Divisive. For devs who like it.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.max_concurrent_segments: Pieces downloaded in parallel for HLS streams (advanced)
advanced.concurrent_fragments_desc: How many file pieces yt-dlp downloads at the same time per video
advanced.stagger_delay_desc: Delay before starting the next concurrent download
advanced.reset_confirm: Are you sure? All settings will be reset.
advanced.torrent_listen_port_desc: TCP port for incoming BitTorrent connections
advanced.cookies_from_browser: Read cookies directly from a browser profile (advanced)
advanced.cookies_from_browser_desc: Only set this if the browser extension isn't working. Most users should leave this empty.

omnibox.placeholder: Paste a URL, magnet link, .torrent, or search
omnibox.batch_file_empty: No valid URLs found in the file
omnibox.no_formats: No formats available for this video
omnibox.formats_merge_note: Video formats (V) will be automatically merged with audio (A) if FFmpeg is available.
omnibox.external_url_ready: URL received from the Chrome extension

debug.title: Debug info
debug.description: Environment details to paste in a bug report. Does not include any secrets.

about.debug_disabled_redirect: Debug page is hidden. Enable it in Settings → Advanced → Diagnostics.
about.description: your media downloader. open source and free.
about.terms_text: OmniGet is provided as is and we make no guarantees. the app makes it easier to download content that's publicly available on the internet, but we take zero responsibility for what you download or what you do with it. by using OmniGet, you agree to that.
about.legal_text: personal use of OmniGet is supported by Article 184, §4 of the Brazilian Penal Code, which says that copying a work for your own private use, in a single copy, without any profit intent, is not a crime. that said, this doesn't mean you can distribute, resell, or use downloaded content commercially. copyright law still applies in civil matters.
about.responsibility_text: you (the user) are responsible for what you do with OmniGet and the content you get through it. respect copyright and each platform's terms of service. always credit the original creators. don't use it for anything illegal or commercial that violates someone else's rights. if you're using content for education, cite your sources.
about.mascot_text: Loop is OmniGet's mascot, an expressive little creature that reacts to your downloads in real time. we want to keep Loop safe, so here are a few rules: you can make fan art of Loop freely, but you can't use his design or artworks commercially, in your own projects, or modify and redistribute the original artworks from the project.
about.license_text: OmniGet is open source and licensed under GPL-3.0. the source code is on GitHub. the "OmniGet" name, logo, and Loop are project trademarks and aren't covered by the code license.
about.star_description: if you enjoy the project, leave a star!
about.feature_platforms: downloads from 10+ platforms and 1000+ more via yt-dlp: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit, Twitch, Pinterest, Vimeo, Bluesky, Telegram
about.feature_hotmart: Hotmart course downloads with login (videos, attachments, descriptions)
about.feature_progress: real-time download progress with ETA and speed
about.feature_mascot: Loop, the mascot that reacts to your downloads
about.feature_themes: 11 themes: Dark, Light, Catppuccin (4 flavors), One Dark Pro, Dracula, NyxVamp (3 variants)
about.feature_i18n: available in English, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Italian, and French
about.feature_tech: built with Tauri + Rust. fast and lightweight
about.roadmap_intro: what's planned for the next versions of OmniGet.
about.roadmap_community_text: we're accepting ideas and suggestions! it's a great way to request a new platform or feature.
about.roadmap_community_issue: or open an issue on the repository:

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.plugin_install_hint: Install this plugin from the Marketplace to use it.
marketplace.plugin_restart_hint: Restart OmniGet to load this plugin.
marketplace.plugin_incompatible_hint: This plugin was built for an older version of OmniGet and cannot be loaded. Reinstall it from the Marketplace to get a compatible build — restarting will not fix this.
marketplace.plugin_load_failed_hint: OmniGet couldn't load this plugin. Try reinstalling it from the Marketplace.

services.title: Supports YouTube, Instagram and 1000+ sites
services.disclaimer: availability depends on each platform and may vary

terms_note.agreement: by continuing, you agree to the

convert.title: Convert
convert.empty: No files selected. Add files to convert.
convert.no_ffmpeg: FFmpeg not found. Install FFmpeg to use conversion.

onboarding.welcome_desc: I'll help you download any video or course from the internet. Simple, fast, and free.
onboarding.folder_desc: Choose the folder where your videos and courses will be saved.
onboarding.deps_desc: I need a couple of tools to work properly. I can install everything automatically!
onboarding.done_desc: Paste a URL in the search bar and watch the magic happen.
onboarding.plugins_desc: Choose which features to install. You can always add or remove them later from the Marketplace.
onboarding.hotkey_desc: Copy any video URL, press the hotkey, and OmniGet starts downloading instantly — even when minimized.

hints.omnibox: Paste the URL of the video or media you want to download here.
hints.telegram: Connect your Telegram account to download media from channels and groups.
hints.hotkey: Global hotkey: automatically downloads the URL currently in your clipboard.
hints.clipboard: Detects URLs automatically when you copy a link and fills the omnibox.
hints.downloads_empty: Your downloads will appear here. Go to the home page to start.
hints.convert: Convert media files between formats using FFmpeg.

common.ytdlp_missing: yt-dlp is not installed. Install it in Settings to enable downloads.
common.cookie_error_message: Automatic cookie detection only works with Firefox. Chrome, Edge, and other Chromium-based browsers block cookie access. To use cookies: install Firefox and log in to your accounts there, or export a cookies.txt file from your browser and set it in Settings > Download > Cookie file.
common.cookie_file_hint: Export cookies from your browser using an extension like 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY' and select the file here. This is required for Chrome/Edge users who need authenticated downloads.

errors.login_required: Login required — use browser cookies or try another URL
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests (429) — try again later
errors.access_denied: Access denied (403) — video may be private or region-restricted
errors.extraction_failed: Extraction failed — update yt-dlp or try again
errors.connection_timeout: Connection timed out — check your internet
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg not found — install it in Settings
errors.page_access_failed: Could not access the page — check the link and connection
errors.no_formats: No video formats found for this link
errors.cookie_database: Browser cookie access failed. Download will continue without authentication.
errors.tiktok_blocked: TikTok is temporarily blocking requests. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.download_timeout: Download timed out. Check your internet connection.
errors.size_mismatch: Downloaded file size doesn't match. Try again.
errors.disk_full: Write error — your disk may be full.
errors.path_too_long: Download folder path is too long ({{current}}/{{limit}} chars). Choose a shorter folder.

debug.title: Activity Log
debug.enable_desc: See what OmniGet is doing behind the scenes
debug.no_entries: No activity yet. Start a download to see events here.

p2p.send_description: Send any file to another OmniGet user. A share code will be generated — the receiver pastes it in the omnibox to download.
p2p.share_hint: Share this code with the receiver
p2p.receive_description: Someone wants to send you a file. Accept to start downloading.

mascot.idle: Paste a link or search to get started!|What are we downloading today?|Ready when you are!
mascot.detecting: Hmm, let me check this...|Analyzing the link...|One sec...
mascot.detected: Got it! Ready when you are!|Found it! Let's go?|All set!
mascot.preparing: Setting things up...|Almost ready...|Preparing your download...
mascot.search: Here's what I found!|Take a look!|Check these out!
mascot.error: Oops, something went wrong. Wanna try again?|That didn't work. Let's try again?|Hmm, something broke...
mascot.complete: All done!|Download complete!|Got it for you!
mascot.amazed: Wow, your first download! 🎉|There it is — your first one!|Saved! Welcome aboard!
mascot.downloading: Downloading now...|Working on it!|Getting your files...
mascot.stalled: Hmm, this is taking a while...|Hang tight, still working...|The connection seems slow...
mascot.queue: Waiting in line...|Patience, almost there...|Your turn is coming!

courses.title: Courses
courses.update_plugin_hint: Update the Courses plugin for the best experience.
courses.update_plugin_for_platform: This platform requires an updated Courses plugin. Check the Marketplace for updates.
courses.browser_hint: A browser window will open for you to log in. After logging in, your session will be detected automatically.
courses.otp_check_email: Check your email for the verification code.

hotmart.title: Hotmart
hotmart.no_courses: No courses found in this account.
hotmart.captcha_detected: Captcha detected — please solve it in the login window.

udemy.title: Udemy
udemy.waiting_code: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Please enter it in the login window.
udemy.no_courses: No courses found in this account.
udemy.cookies_instructions: For Udemy Business/Enterprise accounts (e.g. company.udemy.com), export your cookies from the browser using an extension like "Get cookies.txt locally" in JSON format, then paste or load the file here.

hub.title: Study
hub.subtitle: Turn your downloaded courses into a deliberate practice loop.

search.hint: Press Ctrl+K to open · Esc to close

library.title: Library
library.empty: No courses indexed yet. Run a scan from Settings.
library.error_loading_notes: Couldn't load your notes. Try reloading or contact support if it persists.
library.health_ok: Library is healthy. No problems detected.
library.cleanup_confirm_message: Will remove {{count}} lesson(s) whose video file no longer exists on disk. Courses whose entire folder is gone are preserved (likely an unmounted drive). Courses left with no lessons are removed too. No files are deleted from disk.
library.cleanup_done: {{lessons}} lesson(s) removed · {{courses}} course(s) removed · {{kept}} preserved (unmounted drive)
library.cleanup_force_hint: Use this if you renamed/deleted folders intentionally. WARNING: disconnected external drives will be wiped too.
library.cleanup_force_confirm_message: Will remove ALL {{count}} entries, INCLUDING courses whose entire folder no longer exists on disk. Use only if you're sure folders were renamed/deleted and this isn't a disconnected external drive. Orphan courses are removed too. No files are deleted from disk.
library.notes_no_open_page: No page open. Create or select one in the sidebar.
library.no_platforms: Set a platform on a course to filter here.
library.roots_hint: Toggle folders on or off to include them in scans.
library.browse_empty_roots: Add a folder to get started.

telegram.plugin_missing_body: Install the Telegram plugin from the marketplace to access your chats here.
telegram.coming_soon: Telegram browser coming soon — auth is wired up.

auth.title: Connect Telegram
auth.subtitle: Sign in to browse your chats and media.
auth.qr_hint_scan: Open Telegram › Settings › Devices › Link Desktop Device

telegram.chats_subtitle: Open a chat to browse its media.
telegram.chat_empty: No media of this type in this chat.
telegram.folder_autoscan_desc: Find channels marked with [og] in title or [telegram-drive-folder] in description.
telegram.favorites_empty: No favorites yet. Star items inside a chat to pin them here.
telegram.smart_empty: No favorites match this folder. Star items to populate it.
telegram.flood_wait_hint: Telegram asked us to wait before more requests
telegram.list_trimmed_hint: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} chats. Use search to find specific ones.
telegram.auto_resume_downloads_hint: On app start, resume downloads that were in progress.
telegram.player_not_playable: This media type can't be played inline.
telegram.player_kbd_hint: Esc close · J/↓ next · K/↑ previous
telegram.allow_remote_delete_hint: Lets the bulk delete button erase messages from Telegram. Off by default.
telegram.move_needs_delete_perm: Enable "Allow remote delete" in settings to move (move = copy + delete original).
telegram.delete_confirm_body: {{n}} messages will be deleted from Telegram. Cannot be undone.
telegram.player_book_hint: PDF/EPUB — download to read in the embedded reader.
telegram.create_folder_hint: Creates a private Telegram channel marked as a course folder.
telegram.chats_empty_hint: Create your first folder to start hosting courses on Telegram.
telegram.folder_delete_body: The Telegram channel will be removed permanently along with all uploads. Cannot be undone.

player.title: Player
player.placeholder: Select a lesson from the library to start.

course.no_lessons: No lessons found for this course.

lesson.no_video: Video file not found on disk.

notes.title: Notes
notes.placeholder: Notes you take while studying will appear here.
notes.empty: No notes yet. Take one while watching a lesson.
notes.quick_placeholder: Quick note at {{time}} — press Enter to save
notes.quick_note_hint: Press N while watching to capture a note at the current time.
notes.select_or_new: Select a note or create a new one.
notes.delete_body: The note will be removed permanently. Cannot be undone.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Local XP — no leaderboard, no social comparison
achievements.history_empty: Nothing here yet. Study something to start earning XP.
achievements.reset_desc: Clears XP, achievements, and counters. Does not affect course progress.
achievements.reset_confirm_message: XP, level, achievements, and counters will be cleared. This action cannot be undone.

focus.title: Focus
focus.placeholder: Pomodoro and deep-work sessions live here.
focus.no_session: No active session. Pick a preset to begin.
focus.history_empty: No sessions yet. Start one to build the streak.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unsupported: Notifications not supported in this browser

focus.hero_subtitle: Pick a subject and a preset to begin.
focus.page_subtitle: Focused sessions with Pomodoro or deep work
focus.stop_body: The session will be marked as interrupted and won't count towards stats.

progress.title: Progress
progress.no_data: No progress yet — watch a lesson to get started.
progress.heatmap_empty: No activity yet. Complete a lesson to light it up.
progress.heatmap_hint: Last {{n}} days · click for daily notes

settings.title: Settings
settings.rescan_desc: Walk the downloads folder again and refresh courses, modules and lessons.
settings.rescan_done: Found {{courses}} course(s) and {{lessons}} lesson(s) in {{ms}} ms.
settings.export_desc: Download a JSON snapshot with courses, notes, flashcards, progress and focus history.
settings.import_desc: Restore from a previously exported JSON file. Existing rows with matching IDs are overwritten.

read.title: Read
read.subtitle: Library of books, PDFs and documents.
read.empty: No books yet. Add folders and click Rescan.
read.soon: Reader under construction. For now, files open in the default app.
read.unsupported_format: Format {{format}} is not yet supported in the internal reader. Use 'Open in default app'.
read.bookmarks_empty: No bookmarks. Press B to mark current page.
read.highlights_empty: Select text on the page and pick a color.
read.export_pdf_ok: Annotated PDF · {{highlights}} highlights · {{bookmarks}} bookmarks · {{notes}} notes · {{inks}} inks
read.bulk_export_hint: Export markdown v2 for every book into a folder
read.roots_hint: Choose where to look for books. Scanner walks these folders recursively and ignores dotfolders.
read.roots_empty: No folders yet. Add one below.
read.empty_no_roots_hint: Add a folder with books to start scanning. Courses and books use separate roots.
read.enrich_search_hint: Looks up by current title + author. Picks best match from OpenLibrary.
read.collections_hint: Group books across folders. Open a collection from the dropdown above to add or remove books.
read.collection_delete_confirm: Delete collection "{{name}}"? Books stay; only the grouping is removed.
read.manga_subtitle: Manga, manhwa, manhua, webtoons and other Japanese-style serialized comics.
read.series_empty_hint: Add folders with CBZ/CBR files or unpacked chapter folders, then scan.
read.clean_orphans_hint: Remove DB rows pointing to files that no longer exist or that became series chapters.
read.orphans_cleared: Removed {{missing}} missing · {{member}} now in manga · {{junk}} junk (LICENSE/README/tiny)
read.manga_clean_orphans_hint: Remove local series whose folder no longer exists.
read.manga_clear_remote_confirm: Delete all manga tracked from MangaDex? Local series stay.
read.manga_clear_all_confirm: Delete every manga from the library, including local? This cannot be undone.
read.entry_empty: No pages found in this chapter.
read.discover_subtitle: Search MangaDex and add to your library.
read.book_discover_subtitle: Search public domain libraries and download free ebooks straight into your library.
read.book_borrow_only_hint: This book is under Controlled Digital Lending. Free download is not available; borrowing requires an archive.org account.
read.annas_subtitle: Shadow-library metasearch. Disabled by default. Jurisdiction-dependent.
read.annas_warning_body1: Anna's Archive aggregates mirrors of LibGen, Z-Library, Sci-Hub and other shadow libraries. Material there may be copyrighted.
read.annas_warning_body2: The legality of accessing, downloading or distributing that content varies per country. In some jurisdictions (Palau, for example) personal use is permitted; in others it is not. You are solely responsible for checking your own laws.
read.annas_warning_body3: omniget-study merely provides a programmable HTTP client. Enabling this source downloads content that YOU chose to request. Keep your own compliance.
read.annas_not_acked: Warning not yet acknowledged — enabling requires confirmation.
read.annas_log_hint: Optional local log of which domains/mirrors each download used. Stored locally only.
read.annas_domains_hint: One per line. Try in order on each request. Reset to clear to defaults.
read.annas_reset_hint: Clears acknowledgement, disables source, restores default domains. Does NOT remove already-downloaded files.
read.annas_reset_confirm: Reset all Anna's Archive settings? Source will be disabled and require re-acknowledgement.
read.annas_warning_modal_line2: Most content there is copyrighted. Downloading it may be legal in your jurisdiction, grey-area, or outright illegal — verify with your local laws.
read.annas_warning_modal_line3: omniget-study does not host content. All downloads go through mirrors YOU configure and YOU trigger.
read.annas_warning_modal_line4: Tick the box below if you understand and accept personal responsibility for your usage.
read.annas_warning_ack_label: I understand. I take full responsibility for my use in my jurisdiction.

empty.library_hint: Download a course via Courses plugin or set the folder in Settings.
empty.notes_hint: Create a note during playback or via Ctrl+Shift+N.
empty.subjects_hint: Add subjects to distribute weekly goals.

maintenance.title: {{feature}} under maintenance
maintenance.lead: We're polishing this section. The rest of Study works normally — this part will be back soon.
maintenance.detail_notes: Block-based editor (Tiptap), backlinks, graph view and templates still being polished.
maintenance.detail_anki: Internal Anki client (FSRS-5, sync, .apkg) is being finalized.
